<Feature id="feat" name="Feature A">
  Demonstrates duplicate ID validation behavior.
  <Definition id="dup-id" name="First" version="1.0.0"
    fields='[{"name":"a","type":"string","required":true}]'
  >
    First definition with duplicate ID.
  </Definition>
  <Definition id="dup-id" name="Second" version="1.0.0"
    fields='[{"name":"b","type":"string","required":true}]'
  >
    Second definition with duplicate ID.
  </Definition>
</Feature>
